welcome:
Welcome to Arvion Lingua AI! 🌐

I'm your personal assistant for language learning and translation, powered by Gemini AI.

👇 Choose an option from the menu below to get started.
main_menu_text: Arvion AI Main Menu 🔹 Translate: Instantly translate text between languages. 🔹 Learn: Interactive exercises to boost your language skills. 🔹 Chat with AI: Have a conversation about anything. 🔹 Settings: Customize your language preferences. Use /stats to see your progress or /fact for a fun fact!
settings_header: ⚙️ Settings Select what you want to change.
select_learning_lang: Please select a language you want to learn:
select_programming_lang: Select a programming language to learn:
universal_translator_prompt: 🌐 Translator Send text or a photo to translate, or use the buttons.
cannot_swap_auto: Cannot swap when source language is set to Auto-detect.
translation_error: ❌ Translation failed. The AI service may be temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
learn_menu_text_human: 🎓 Human Language Zone Your path: {learning_lang} ({level}) Choose an activity:
learn_menu_text_programming: 💻 Programming Zone Your path: {programming_lang} ({level}) Choose an activity:
generation_error: ❌ Could not generate an exercise. Please try again.
learn_word_prompt:
Here is a new word for you ({level}): 
{text_to_translate}
chat_prompt: 🤖 Chat Mode Activated I'm ready to talk!
chat_history_cleared: ✅ Our conversation history has been cleared.
streak_text: 🔥 You are on a {count}-day streak! Keep it up!
select_roleplay_scenario: Select a scenario to practice your skills:
roleplay_started: 🎭 Role-playing mode activated! I will now act as described in the scenario. Let's begin!
persona_cafe: You are a friendly barista in a cafe in a country where they speak {lang}. The user is a customer. Greet them and take their order. Try to upsell a pastry. Be patient if they make mistakes.
persona_hotel: You are a helpful hotel receptionist in a country where they speak {lang}. The user is a guest trying to check in. Ask for their reservation name and offer help with their luggage or information about the city.
persona_job_interview: You are a strict but fair interviewer for a {lang} developer position. The user is the candidate. Ask them a mix of technical and behavioral questions to assess their skills.
could_not_understand_audio: ❌ I couldn't understand the audio. Please try speaking clearly.
voice_error: ❌ An error occurred while processing your voice message.
onboarding_step2: ✅ Great choice! Step 2 / 4 — Choose your learning mode:
onboarding_step3_human: ✅ Got it! Step 3 / 4 — Which language do you want to learn?
onboarding_step3_prog: ✅ Got it! Step 3 / 4 — Which programming language do you want to learn?
onboarding_step4: ✅ Almost done! Step 4 / 4 — What is your current level?
onboarding_done: 🎉 You're all set! Your Arvion Lingua AI is ready. Here's what you can do: 🌐 Translate — text and images 🎓 Learn — words, concepts, quizzes 🤖 Chat — free chat or roleplay scenarios 💾 /vocab — your saved words 📊 /stats — your progress 💡 /fact — fun facts ❓ /help — all commands Let's start learning! 🚀
help_text: ❓ Arvion Lingua AI — Commands Main Features: 🌐 Translate — Translate text or images between 13 languages 🎓 Learn — Words, fill-in-blank, story mode, idioms, grammar check 🤖 Chat — Free chat or 6 roleplay scenarios Commands: /start — Restart the bot /menu — Go to main menu /stats — Progress, badges & streaks /vocab — Your saved vocabulary book /review — Flashcard review (spaced repetition) /wotd — Word of the Day /challenge — Today's daily challenge /leaderboard — Global top 10 /summary — AI summary of your chat session /fact — Fun fact about your language /models — Active AI models /help — Show this message Tips: • 🎤 Voice messages in Chat mode • 📷 Photos in Translate mode • 💾 Save words to vocabulary • ✏️ Fill in the Blank exercises • 📖 Story Mode with comprehension quiz • 💬 Idiom of the Day • 🔤 Grammar Check your writing • 🔥 Keep your daily streak!
save_word_prompt: 📖 {word} — {translation} Want to save this word to your vocabulary book?
word_saved: ✅ {word} saved to your vocabulary book! Use /vocab to review.
word_already_saved: 📖 {word} is already in your vocabulary book.
vocab_empty:
📖 Your vocabulary book is empty.

Start learning words and save them with the 💾 button!
vocab_tip: 💡 Tip: Save words during learning sessions using the 💾 Save Word button.
persona_doctor: You are a friendly doctor in a clinic in a country where they speak {lang}. The user is a patient describing their symptoms. Ask follow-up questions, show empathy, and suggest a simple diagnosis. Be patient if they make language mistakes.
persona_airport: You are a helpful airline check-in agent at an airport in a country where they speak {lang}. The user is a passenger. Ask for their booking reference, check their luggage, and provide gate information. Be professional and friendly.
persona_shopping: You are a friendly shop assistant in a clothing store in a country where they speak {lang}. The user is a customer looking for something to buy. Ask about their preferences, suggest items, and help them with sizes and prices.
grammar_check_prompt: Send me a sentence or text in {lang} and I'll check your grammar:
human_mode_only: ⚠️ This feature is available in Human Languages mode only.
leaderboard_empty: No data yet. Be the first to take a quiz!
challenge_tip: Use the Learn or Translate sections to complete your challenge.
wotd_human_only: ⚠️ Word of the Day is available in Human Languages mode only.
summary_no_history: No conversation history found. Start chatting first!
pronunciation_prompt: 🎤 Say the word {word} out loud and send a voice message:
review_intro: 📖 You have {total} saved words, {due} due for review today.
review_all_done: 🎉 All caught up! No words due for review today.
flashcard_translate_prompt: What is the translation of this word?
scramble_prompt: Unscramble the letters and type the correct word:
scramble_gave_up: The word was: {word}. Better luck next time!
hangman_gave_up: The word was: {word}. Better luck next time!
hangman_one_letter: Please send one letter at a time.
speed_round_intro: ⚡ Speed Round! Translate {count} words as fast as you can! You have {seconds} seconds. Ready?
speed_translate_prompt: Translate this word to your native language:
grammar_guide_intro: 📚 Grammar Guide — {lang} Choose a topic to learn:
culture_intro: 🌍 Culture Corner — {lang} Choose a topic to explore:
